resources.string: How was the route? Please leave a rating
Enter your email to reset your password
A password reset email has been sent
This alias is already taken, choose another
This user has been blocked from VistaDrive due to moderation
Are you sure you want to delete this route? Its points of interest and ratings will also be removed. This action cannot be undone.
There are still points of interest to visit (%1$d of %2$d completed). Do you want to go back to the route or stay to rate?
Are you sure you want to leave without rating?
Password must contain uppercase, lowercase and a symbol
Alias must be less than 25 characters
Name must be less than 25 characters
Description must be less than 100 characters
Description must be less than 500 characters
Comment must be less than 100 characters

⚠️

IMPORTANT: This application is intended to guide the user along tourist routes using GPS and audio playback. It must never be operated by the driver while the vehicle is in motion.

MenkauraSoft accepts no responsibility for any accident, incident, damage, injury, or loss resulting directly or indirectly from the use of this application.

Furthermore, MenkauraSoft does not guarantee the complete accuracy of the routes, points of interest, or the information provided. It is the user's responsibility to be aware of their surroundings and drive with caution at all times.

This application collects location and authentication data through Firebase solely to provide its features. Your data will not be shared with third parties, in compliance with the Spanish Data Protection Act 3/2018 (LOPD).

By using this application, you acknowledge and agree to assume full responsibility for its use and consequences, and release MenkauraSoft from any legal claims or liabilities arising from it.
I\'m your guide and I\'ll help you discover amazing tourist routes. Let\'s explore together!
Here you can see all available routes. Tap on any route to see its details. You can also create your own routes with the button below.
Here you can see the route information and other users\' comments. When you\'re ready, tap the Let\'s Go! button to start navigation.
The map will guide you through each point of interest on the route. As you approach a point, you\'ll hear a voice description. Follow the route and enjoy the journey!
Move along your route and add points of interest using the + button. Once you have all the points, save your route with the save button.
Are you sure you want to leave? The created points of interest will be lost.

VistaDrive needs to access your location at all times to automatically detect when you arrive at each point of interest, even with the screen off or while using other apps.

This permission is required for the voice guidance to work correctly during navigation.

In the next step, select "Allow all the time" to enable this feature.
